title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese describes how he used Claude Code to build a product generating $481,000 annually, going from zero code to a polished codebase in 45 days with a non-technical founder. The video outlines five steps for shipping fast: starting with the problem, knowing where to engineer versus reuse, learning vocabulary, moving methodically, and understanding what breaks.
